name: Rubyyy's Bleeding System
author: Mr. Rubyyy
description: It's a simple bleeding System. It disables Health regeneration. When your Health goes under 65%, you start bleeding. Bleeding can be stopped via bandaging with the "B" key. It stops the bleeding and resets your Health to 65%. To get to full Health again, you need to use a medkit. that can be done with the "N" key. Note that you cant use medkit to stop bleeding and vice versa. Can be a challanging addition to campaign. And can increase realism in the upcoming multiplayer, or againts enemy NPC's.
